chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-444 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.1337/2024 2. For order on M.A No.1338/2024 3. For hearing of main case 07.11.2025 Petitioner-husband Muhammad Abbas Jaffari, is aggrieved by the judgment dated 31.07.2024, passed by the learned II-Additional District Judge, Hyderabad, whereby the judgment and decree dated 27.05.2024, passed by the IX-Civil/Family Judge, Hyderabad in Family Suit No. 804 of 2021, filed by the respondent- Mst. Nabila Fatima, was essentially upheld subject to a modification to the extent that the dower amount of Rs.200,000/- was/is not payable by the respondent-Mst.Nabila Fatima to the petitioner. The petitioner is still aggrieved by the judgments and decrees passed against him, particularly the quantum of maintenance of Rs.10,000/- per month. I have perused the documents available on record and do not find any material irregularity or defect in the orders passed by the two forums below. Even otherwise, the petitioner has remained absent before this Court. No one has appeared on his behalf on 22.09.2025, 31.10.2025 and once again today, i.e., 07.11.2025. It appears that the petitioner has also lost interest in pursuing this petition. Given the reasons, articulated above this petition stands dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
